info.title: Circular Democracy API
info.description: API for processing citizen messages to politicians

get.description: Retrieve message analytics showing daily message counts grouped by campaign for the last N days (default: 7 days)

schema.description: Number of days to look back (default: 7)

parameters.description: Number of days to look back (default: 7)
parameters.name: days

200.description: Message analytics grouped by day and campaign

post.description: Receives a citizen message, classifies it by campaign, and stores it for politician response

sender_name.description: Full name of the message sender

recipient_email.description: Email address of the target politician

text_content.description: Plain text version of message content

timestamp.description: When the message was originally sent (ISO 8601)

campaign_hint.description: Optional campaign name hint from sender

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing Supabase JWT

200.description: Creates broadcast reply rows and sends immediately when JMAP is configured; otherwise leaves messages pending for the scheduled worker.

400.description: Bad request (e.g. no active template or no supporters)

get.description: Retrieve a list of all campaign auto-reply templates. Templates define automated email responses sent to supporters.

post.description: Create a new auto-reply template for a campaign. The template defines the email content, layout, and scheduling for automated responses to supporters. If active=true, this will deactivate other templates for the same campaign.

requestBody.description: Reply template data including subject, message body (markdown), layout type, and send timing.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific campaign auto-reply template.

patch.description: Update an existing auto-reply template. You can modify the subject, message body, layout type, send timing, and active status. Setting active=true will deactivate other templates for the same campaign.

requestBody.description: Fields to update. All fields are optional.

403.description: Forbidden - not authorized to update this template

delete.description: Permanently delete an auto-reply template. This action cannot be undone.

403.description: Forbidden - not authorized to delete this template

post.description: Activate or deactivate an auto-reply template. Only one template can be active per campaign. Setting active=true will automatically deactivate other templates for the same campaign.

active.description: Set to true to activate, false to deactivate

get.description: Check health status of the Stalwart hook service

post.description: Manually trigger scheduled reply processing for admin use

get.description: Check health status of the reply worker service

post.description: Processes incoming emails and provides routing instructions
